file.content:
---
# Ansible Role: ZSH - Default Variables

zsh_deploy_config: true
zsh_config_dir: "{{ ansible_user_dir }}/.config/zsh.d"
zsh_deploy_zshrc: true
zsh_backup_existing: true

tool_input.description: Git log for zsh defaults file

tool_response.stdout:
1ae804c WIPm
c1624b7 skogix. orka
caf87bc feat: add zsh role and configuration

tool_input.command: git log --all --oneline --follow -10 -- roles/zsh/defaults/main.yml && git show caf87bc:roles/zsh/defaults/main.yml 2>/dev/null

tool_response.stdout:
1ae804c WIPm
c1624b7 skogix. orka
caf87bc feat: add zsh role and configuration
---
zsh_install: true
zsh_package_name: "zsh"
zsh_deploy_config: true
zsh_set_default_shell: false
zsh_config_dir: "{{ ansible_user_dir }}/.config/zsh.d"

file.content:
---
# Deploy .zshrc file

- name: "zsh | Deploy .zshrc from template"
  ansible.builtin.template:
    src: "{{ zsh_zshrc_template }}"
    dest: "{{ ansible_user_dir }}/.zshrc"
    mode: '0644'
    backup: "{{ zsh_backup_existing }}"
  tags: [zsh, zsh-zshrc]

zsh_backup_existing: true

---
# Ansible Role: ZSH - Default Variables

zsh_deploy_config: true
zsh_config_dir: "{{ ansible_user_dir }}/.config/zsh.d"
zsh_deploy_zshrc: true
zsh_backup_existing: true

tool_response.stdout:
62b9d65 fix(packages): bootstrap AUR idempotently
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

python -m unittest discover -s tests

ansible-galaxy collection install -r .requirements.yml

syntax_check() {
  local playbook="$1"
  shift

  ansible-playbook "./playbooks/${playbook}" -i .inventory --syntax-check "$@"
}

syntax_check bootstrap.yml
syntax_check maintenance.yml
syntax_check test_users.yml

vault_password_file="${ANSIBLE_VAULT_PASSWORD_FILE:-$HOME/.ssh/ansible-vault-password}"
if [[ -f "$vault_password_file" ]]; then
  syntax_check default.yml --vault-password-file "$vault_password_file"
  syntax_check site.yml --vault-password-file "$vault_password_file"
  syntax_check workstation.yml --vault-password-file "$vault_password_file"
fi

commit 62b9d65763d411a5f1c3b0867d88450bd60f58db
Author: codex <codex@skogai.se>
Date:   Sun May 31 06:14:23 2026 +0200

    fix(packages): bootstrap AUR idempotently
    
    Enable the git role to clone the skogai repos and run a post-install command on change, switch AUR helper installation and package management to pikaur, preinstall pyalpm for bootstrap, and restore the aur_builder become flow for AUR tasks.

62b9d65763d411a5f1c3b0867d88450bd60f58db
codex
codex@skogai.se
Sun May 31 06:14:23 2026 +0200
fix(packages): bootstrap AUR idempotently

Enable the git role to clone the skogai repos and run a post-install command on change, switch AUR helper installation and package management to pikaur, preinstall pyalpm for bootstrap, and restore the aur_builder become flow for AUR tasks.

file.content:
---
- name: "Packages | Install AUR packages"
  kewlfft.aur.aur:
    name: "{{ aur_packages }}"
    use: pikaur
    state: present
  when: aur_packages is defined and aur_packages | length > 0
  tags: [packages, aur, aur-packages]

  tags: [packages, aur, aur-packages]
tool_input.new_string:
- name: "Packages | Install AUR packages"
  kewlfft.aur.aur:
    name: "{{ aur_packages }}"
    use: pikaur
    state: present
  become: true
  become_user: aur_builder
  when: aur_packages is defined and aur_packages | length > 0
  tags: [packages, aur, aur-packages]
